name: American Picture House Corp
business: American Picture House Corporation is an entertainment company focused on the development, packaging, financing and production of feature films and limited series. It seeks to operate as a publicly traded independent film co-financier and co-producer, applying disciplined underwriting and structured deal terms. Revenue is generated from project-level financing arrangements and licensing of film rights.

exposures.sentence: American Picture House Corporation ( APHP ) , also known as American Picture House Pictures, is an entertainment company focused on the development, packaging, financing and production of feature films and limited series.

Consumer viewing has shifted toward subscription streaming, ad-supported streaming, FAST channels, mobile and connected-TV viewing, and other digital platforms, while release windows, licensing practices, advertising models and platform economics continue to evolve.

catalysts.event: Target release of MOTION in Q2 2026
catalysts.sentence: MOTION is in post-production; APHP served as a production company co-financing and co-production company on the film, and the Company is currently targeting a release during the second quarter of 2026, although timing is subject to change.

catalysts.event: Labrys Fund II note amortization begins
catalysts.sentence: The note includes customary covenants and events of default and provides for amortization beginning March 23, 2026, subject to the note's terms.

catalysts.event: Option to acquire ownership interest in POSE expires
catalysts.sentence: On December 29, 2025, the Company entered into Amendment No. 1 to its August 1, 2025 agreement with SSS Entertainment, LLC, which (i) extended the Company's option relating to POSE through March 31, 2026
